name: Hou List Children
description: List all child nodes under a Houdini network path. Returns a list of child node info (name, type, path).
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    from src.utils.hou_bridge import get_bridge

    path = inputs.get('parent_path') or self.get_parameter('parent_path', '/obj')

    try:
        bridge = get_bridge()
        children = bridge.children(path)
        self.log_info(f'{path} has {len(children)} children')
        await self.set_output('children', children)
        await self.set_output('count', len(children))
    except Exception as e:
        self.log_error(f'Failed to list children: {e}')
        await self.set_output('children', [])
        await self.set_output('count', 0)

    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {}
